title: 2.1.A: Stage probability + weighted column total
description:
## Scope
Add probability field to DealStage, populate defaults, factor weighted-total into a pure helper with Vitest tests, render weighted total as primary in DealColumn header with raw sum on hover.

## Spec
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-stage-probability/2026-05-21-stage-probability-spec.md

## Worker Instructions
- Complete tasks in order (each depends on the previous).
- Read .devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-stage-probability/context-log.md before starting.
- Read .devmeta/lessons-learned.md before starting.
- Append learnings to context-log.md when done.
